Featured Courses

Exceptional destinations for your Hawaii golf experience

Public

Coral Creek Golf Course

Ewa Beach, Oahu

Par 72|7,200 yds
Hard

Semi-private feel with championship layout near Ewa Beach

View Course
Public

Ewa Beach Golf Club

Ewa Beach, Oahu

Par 72|6,954 yds
Hard

Links-style championship golf on Leeward Oahu

View Course
Public

Hawaii Kai Golf Course

Honolulu, Oahu

Par 72|6,700 yds
Medium

Two courses: Championship and Par-3 Executive, designed by William Bell and Robert Trent Jones Sr.

View Course
Municipal

Kahuku Golf Course

Kahuku, Oahu

Par 72|5,230 yds
Medium

Closest course on Oahu to real links seaside layout. Walking only.

View Course
Public

Kapolei Golf Club

Kapolei, Oahu

Par 72|7,200 yds
Hard

Championship layout in Kapolei on Leeward Oahu

View Course
Resort

Ko Olina Golf Club

Kapolei, Oahu

Par 72|6,900 yds
Hard

Ted Robinson designed resort course, former host of LPGA Lotte Championship

View Course
Public

Ko'olau Golf Club

Kaneohe, Oahu

Par 72|7,300 yds
Hard

Dramatic mountain golf at the base of the Ko'olau Range with breathtaking views

View Course
Semi-Private

Moanalua Golf Club

Honolulu, Oahu

Par 36|3,200 yds
Medium

THE FIRST GOLF COURSE IN HAWAII (built 1898). Historic 9-hole layout.

View Course
